artisan_app.titre: Your workspace is on the mobile app
artisan_app.intro: The Gextimo Artisan workspace — clients, orders, measurements and more — is optimized for the mobile app.
artisan_app.sous_texte: Download the app or continue in your browser.

galerie.quota_atteint: Monthly quota reached. Come back next month or upgrade your plan.
galerie.vide_desc: Add photos of fabrics, creations or inspirations.

tuto.s1_texte: Gather photos of your real work. They appear on your public showcase and feed the Gextimo inspiration catalog.
tuto.s2_texte: Tap “Add”: your phone's photo picker opens. Select one or several creations, then confirm.
tuto.s3_texte: Only publish YOUR own photos (taken by you), sharp and well-lit. Each photo becomes visible and findable on the showcase.

premium.sous_titre: Start for free, upgrade to a paid plan when you're ready. No commitment, cancel anytime.
premium.essai: Not convinced yet? The Free plan is free, no credit card required.

faq.q: Can I change plan at any time?
faq.r: Yes, you can upgrade or downgrade at any time. The difference is prorated.

faq.q: Is the Free plan really free?
faq.r: Yes, the Free plan is free with no commitment and no credit card. You only move to a paid plan when you want to.
Yearly billing is paid in one go and represents about 2 months free compared to monthly billing.
Yes, your data is encrypted and backed up daily.

ma_vitrine.sous_titre: Your presence on the Gextimo marketplace.

inscription.title: Your African design showcase is waiting
inscription.subtitle: Create your space in 2 minutes, from your browser.
inscription.body: Your space is available on the web as soon as you sign up. To go further — manage orders on the move, get notifications and reach advanced features — download the mobile app.

cookies.text: We use cookies to improve your experience and remember your preferences (language, currency, theme).
cookies.panel_desc: Choose what Gextimo may use to run the platform, personalise your experience and measure how well it works. You can change these choices at any time.
cookies.desc_essentiels: Required for the site to work: secure sign-in, cart, order tracking. Without them, Gextimo cannot function properly.
cookies.desc_preferences: Remember your settings so you don't have to set them again on each visit: language, currency, light or dark theme, last search.
cookies.desc_personnalisation: Tailor the storefront to your taste: designers, artisans and collections highlighted based on what you browse.
cookies.desc_statistiques: Help us understand how the platform is used, so we can improve it. Aggregated data, never sold.
cookies.desc_marketing: Enable sponsored highlighting of designers and campaigns, on Gextimo and on our networks.
cookies.footnote: You can revisit these choices at any time from the footer (Cookie policy) or your account settings. Learn more in our Privacy policy.

list.texte: I received my evening dress in 10 days. The stitching was impeccable and the creator very responsive.
Since I got my Gextimo showcase, I receive requests every week. My studio has really taken off.
Managing orders and measurements has become so much simpler. I'm not going back.

about.title: The African fashion ecosystem
about.p1: Gextimo connects fashion creators — tailors, stylists, pattern makers — with their clients across Benin and West Africa. Our mission: showcase African craftsmanship and make it easy for talents and clients to meet.
about.p2: We give creators a professional showcase, management tools (clients, orders, measurements, cash register) and, soon, ways to monetize their visibility.

aide.title: Support & FAQ
aide.subtitle: Answers to the most common questions.

faq.q: How do I create my creator account?
faq.a: Download the Gextimo app and sign up in minutes. Your public showcase is generated automatically.

faq.q: How do I publish my creations?
faq.a: From your space, add your models to your catalogue then enable their publication on the showcase.

faq.q: How does a client contact me?
faq.a: If you enable the option, a WhatsApp button appears on your public profile to receive quotes and orders.
Account creation and the basic showcase are free. Premium options will come to boost your visibility.

aide.contact: Write to us at support.gextimo@novafriq.africa — we reply within 48 h.

artisans.title: A central gallery of inspirations
artisans.p1: Browse a library of models and collections to find inspiration, compare styles and choose the creator who will make your custom outfit.
artisans.p2: Many models are freely accessible to help you express your ideas to your tailor.

chatbot.signature: Intelligence in the service of African fashion.
chatbot.confidentialite: Conversations are recorded to improve the service.
chatbot.accueil:
Welcome to Gextimo! I am Makila AI, your smart assistant for the world of fashion, tailoring and textile creation.

I can help you discover designers, find outfits, personalise your orders, track your purchases and answer all your questions.

How can I help you today?
chatbot.erreur: Connection hiccup. Try again, or write to support.gextimo@novafriq.africa.
chatbot.infos_texte: Makila AI is Gextimo's smart assistant. Your conversations may be recorded to improve the quality of the service. No data is sold or shared with third parties for commercial purposes.
chatbot.modal_apropos: Makila AI is Gextimo's smart assistant. It helps you discover designers, find outfits and track your orders, with a particular focus on African fashion and craftsmanship.
chatbot.modal_confidentialite: Your conversations with Makila AI may be recorded to improve the quality of the service. No data is shared without your consent.
chatbot.modal_aide: Need help? Find answers to the most frequent questions about orders, designers and using Gextimo.
chatbot.modal_avis: Your opinion matters. Use the thumbs under each Makila AI answer to tell us whether it helped: this lets us improve continuously.
chatbot.equipe_reprise: Makila answers you right away, 24/7, a team member takes over from {{heure}}:00.

confidentialite.title: Privacy Policy
confidentialite.subtitle: Application: GEXTIMO | Publisher: NOVAFRIQ, SASU
confidentialite.version: Version 4.0: Established under Article 415 of the Digital Code (Law No. 2017-20 of 20 April 2018).

articles.title: ARTICLE 1: IDENTITY OF THE DATA CONTROLLER

blocks.t: The controller of your data is ADJAHO Patrick Dona, President and founder of NOVAFRIQ. He is the sole controller.
Address: Quartier Agblangandan, Sèmè-Podji, Republic of Benin.
Contact: dpo@novafriq.africa | +229 01 66 55 29 92
NOVAFRIQ is not required to appoint a DPO. For anything relating to your data, write directly to the controller: dpo@novafriq.africa.

articles.title: ARTICLE 2: PRIOR FORMALITIES WITH THE APDP

blocks.t: This processing is declared to the APDP under deliberation No. {{apdp_deliberation}}.
You can contact the APDP: Rue 6.076, Aïdjèdo, Cotonou · +229 21 32 57 88 / 69 55 00 00 · contact@apdp.bj · www.apdp.bj

rows: Mobile Money and cards (via FedaPay), collected from payment activation

blocks.t: Two profiles coexist on GEXTIMO. The Designer profile is public: creations are displayed on the platform's storefront and can generate sales (from payment activation). The Artisan profile is reserved for the mobile app: it is not published on the platform's storefront and does not give rise to any transaction via GEXTIMO. The data collected is identical for both; only the exposure and purpose differ.

blocks.title: Sign-in via a third-party identity provider (if enabled)
blocks.t: If you choose to sign in to GEXTIMO via a third-party service (e.g. Google), we receive from that provider: your email address, your name and, where applicable, your profile picture. We do not access your password. This data is used solely to create and manage your GEXTIMO account.

items: Create and manage your professional account
Operate GEXTIMO: creators, collections, orders and storefront
Process your payments and commissions
Improve the app and your experience
Secure the platform and prevent fraud
Keep you informed: notifications, updates, support
Comply with our legal obligations
We collect it at registration and while you use GEXTIMO
We store it securely (see Article 8)
We process it only for the reasons in Article 4
We delete it once the periods in Article 3 are reached

blocks.t: 6.1: Internal access
Within NOVAFRIQ, the sole controller of your data is ADJAHO Patrick Dona. Internal access is limited to what is strictly necessary. No associate, contractor or investor is responsible for your data.
6.2: Technical service providers

rows: VPS hosting: main server and encrypted backups
Mobile Money payment processing (MTN / Moov / Orange)

blocks.t: These providers act as processors. They process data solely on NOVAFRIQ's instruction under contractual confidentiality commitments (see Document 10).
6.3: Legal recipients
We share your data with Beninese authorities (justice, tax, administration) only upon official request. We never sell, rent or transfer your data to third parties for commercial purposes.

articles.title: ARTICLE 7: PROMINENT DISCLOSURE OF IN-APP PERMISSIONS

rows: Order alerts, deadlines and customer messages
Profile photo, fabric or creation photo

blocks.t: Text displayed to the user at each permission request:

blocks.name: Permission: Camera
blocks.t: GEXTIMO would like to access your Camera. Why: to allow you to photograph your creations, fabrics or professional profile directly from the app. By tapping 'Allow', you accept this access. You may refuse and continue using GEXTIMO without this feature.

blocks.name: Permission: Storage / Gallery
blocks.t: GEXTIMO would like to access your Gallery. Why: to allow you to import images from your gallery. GEXTIMO does not access your entire gallery; only the chosen image is imported. If refused, image import is disabled; all other features remain available.

blocks.name: Permission: Notifications
blocks.t: GEXTIMO would like to send you Notifications. Why: to inform you of new orders, deadlines, customer messages and important updates. If refused, no push notifications will reach you; you will need to check the app manually.
Data is hosted in the Paris datacenter (France, European Union). This transfer outside Benin is subject to the cross-border data flow authorisation formality with the APDP.

items: Encrypted exchanges (HTTPS/TLS)
Access limited to what is strictly necessary
Connection protected by authentication tokens
Encrypted backups every week
Regular security updates to the server (Debian)
Each user's space is isolated from others

blocks.t: In the event of an incident, we notify the APDP as soon as possible. If the risk is high, we also notify you (see Document 6).

rows: Obtain a copy of data concerning you
Ask NOVAFRIQ about processing carried out
Object to any processing of your data
Receive your data in a structured format
Have your data no longer used
Obtain redress for damage caused by unlawful processing

blocks.t: Withdrawal of consent: Practical mechanisms
You may withdraw your consent at any time without affecting processing carried out before withdrawal.

items: Device permissions: Phone settings > Apps > GEXTIMO > Permissions > disable the permission. Immediate effect.
Analytics preferences: GEXTIMO > Settings > Privacy > Data preferences. Applied within 48 hours.
Account deletion: dpo@novafriq.africa stating 'Delete my account'. Erasure within 30 days (except legal obligations).

blocks.t: To exercise these rights: dpo@novafriq.africa. We respond within 60 days (Digital Code).
GEXTIMO is not intended for minors under 18. It is a professional tool reserved for adult artisans and entrepreneurs: you must be 18 to create an account.

articles.title: ARTICLE 12: RIGHT TO COMPLAIN TO THE APDP

blocks.t: You may lodge a complaint with the APDP: Rue 6.076, Aïdjèdo, Cotonou · contact@apdp.bj · www.apdp.bj
See Document 4: Cookie and Tracker Management Policy in this file.
GEXTIMO may contain links or redirections to services we do not operate: Mobile Money payment pages (MTN, Moov, Orange), WhatsApp for support, or any other external service.
Once you leave GEXTIMO to access one of these services, their own terms of use and privacy policies apply. NOVAFRIQ is not responsible for the content, practices or data collected by these services.
Links to the GEXTIMO storefront (gextimo.novafriq.africa) remain subject to this policy and NOVAFRIQ's ToU.
In the event of a material change to this policy:

items: We notify you at least 30 days before the change takes effect, by email or via an in-app notification.
The new version is presented clearly to you, with a summary of the changes made.
If you continue to use GEXTIMO after the effective date, you are deemed to have accepted the revised version.
If you do not accept the changes, you may stop using GEXTIMO before the effective date, or contact us at dpo@novafriq.africa to exercise your right to account deletion.

blocks.t: Minor changes (wording corrections, contact detail updates) may be made without 30 days' notice and are indicated by updating the date at the top of the policy.

mentions.title: Legal Notice
mentions.subtitle: Application and website: GEXTIMO | URL: gextimo.novafriq.africa

blocks.t: All content on GEXTIMO (code, design, logo, text, structure) is the exclusive property of NOVAFRIQ, protected by Beninese law and international intellectual property conventions.

Creations displayed by designers and stylists on the platform (photos, models, collections) remain the exclusive property of their authors. NOVAFRIQ acts as a host of these contents and cannot be held liable for content published by users.
See Document 1, Privacy Policy and Document 4, Cookie Policy in this file. Supervisory authority: APDP, www.apdp.bj
The publication director of the Gextimo service is the legal representative of Novafriq Groupe. For any question regarding the site's editorial content, write to direction@novafriq.africa.

These legal notices are governed by Beninese law. Any dispute relating to their interpretation or performance falls under the competent courts of Cotonou, subject to mandatory consumer-protection rules.

cookies.title: Cookie Management Policy
cookies.subtitle: Application: GEXTIMO | Publisher: NOVAFRIQ, SASU
cookies.version: Version 4.0, Established under Law No. 2017-20, Digital Code of the Republic of Benin.

blocks.t: A cookie is a small text file placed on your device (phone, computer, tablet) when you use GEXTIMO. It allows the app to recognise you, remember your preferences and measure use of the service.
Trackers refer to all technologies similar to cookies: tracking pixels, device identifiers, local storage.

articles.title: ARTICLE 2: WHY DOES GEXTIMO USE COOKIES?

blocks.t: GEXTIMO uses cookies for three essential reasons:

items: To run the service: without these cookies, you cannot sign in, access your collections or carry out transactions. They are essential.
To improve your experience: these cookies remember your preferences (language, display) to offer you personalised navigation.
To measure and improve the platform: these cookies help us understand how you use GEXTIMO in order to identify issues and improve our features.

blocks.t: GEXTIMO may integrate third-party services that place their own cookies:

items: [Analytics tool: to be specified]: anonymised audience measurement
FedaPay: securing payment transactions
[WhatsApp Business: if integrated]: communication with support

blocks.t: These providers are subject to their own privacy policies. NOVAFRIQ does not control cookies placed by these third-party services.

articles.title: ARTICLE 5: HOW TO MANAGE YOUR COOKIES?

blocks.t: You have several ways to control cookies:
5.1: Via GEXTIMO
Go to GEXTIMO > Settings > Privacy > Cookie settings to enable or disable non-essential cookies. Essential cookies cannot be disabled as they are indispensable to the service.
5.2: Via your device
Android: Settings > Apps > GEXTIMO > Permissions | iOS: Settings > GEXTIMO > Privacy
5.3: Via your browser (website)
If you access the GEXTIMO storefront via a browser, you can manage cookies in your browser settings (Chrome, Firefox, Safari, Edge).
Cookies are retained for the duration shown in the table in Article 3. Upon expiry, they are automatically deleted. You may delete them at any time via your device or app settings.
For any question about our use of cookies: dpo@novafriq.africa

protection_donnees.title: Data Protection (APDP)
protection_donnees.subtitle: Application: GEXTIMO: African Fashion Marketplace | Publisher: NOVAFRIQ, SASU
meta_lines: Public compliance page. For full details, see Document 1 (Privacy) and Document 4 (Cookies).
protection_donnees.version: Version 7.0: Public APDP compliance summary. See Documents 1, 4, 5, 6, 7 for full details.

blocks.t: NOVAFRIQ protects your personal data in accordance with Law No. 2017-20. Digital Code of the Republic of Benin and the requirements of the APDP (Personal Data Protection Authority).
The processing of your data is declared to the APDP under deliberation No. {{apdp_deliberation}}.
Data Controller: ADJAHO Patrick Dona. NOVAFRIQ. Contact: dpo@novafriq.africa.
You have the rights of access, rectification, deletion, objection, portability and to be forgotten regarding your data.
To exercise them: dpo@novafriq.africa. We respond within 60 days.

Your data is hosted in a datacenter located in Paris (France, European Union), at Hostinger International Ltd. This transfer outside Benin is subject to the cross-border data flow authorisation formality with the APDP.
You may contact the APDP at any time: Rue 6.076, Aïdjèdo, Cotonou · contact@apdp.bj · www.apdp.bj · +229 21 32 57 88.

cgu.title: Terms of Use
cgu.subtitle: Application: GEXTIMO | Publisher: NOVAFRIQ, SASU
cgu.version: Version 4.0: Established under Beninese law and OHADA law.

articles.title: ARTICLE 1: PURPOSE AND PRESENTATION OF THE SERVICE

blocks.t: These terms (ToU) set the rules for using GEXTIMO, the African fashion marketplace published by NOVAFRIQ. GEXTIMO connects creators, artisans and stylists with their customers through an online storefront (gextimo.novafriq.africa) and a mobile app.

On GEXTIMO, designers and stylists display their collections. Payments go through FedaPay, an approved payment aggregator: NOVAFRIQ never holds customer funds. FedaPay collects on behalf of the creator, NOVAFRIQ deducts its commission, then FedaPay remits the balance to the creator. Basic access is free; advanced features are by subscription.

blocks.title: Note: Launch mode
blocks.t: At launch, GEXTIMO operates in referral mode. Online payment, commission and FedaPay remittance are not yet active: payments are settled directly between the customer and the creator, outside the platform. These features will be activated later, with 30 days' notice. Once activated, the Terms of Sale & Commissions (Document 9) and the Delivery, Returns & Refunds policy (Document 16) apply automatically. While payment is not active, we do not collect your payment data or remittance details.
By creating an account or using the app, you accept these ToU. If we make material changes, we notify you 30 days in advance.
To access GEXTIMO, you create an account with accurate information. You keep your credentials secret and are responsible for everything that happens on your account.
We guarantee 99% availability per calendar month, excluding planned maintenance announced 48 hours in advance.

rows: 15% on each sale made via GEXTIMO (applicable from online payment activation)

blocks.t: The commission applied to sales on the Free plan is 15% of the sale price. No commission is charged on sales by creators with an active subscription (Standard or Premium). This commission applies from online payment activation.
Subscription prices in force are shown in the GEXTIMO app at sign-up and constitute the binding contractual reference. Any price change is communicated to the user with 30 days' notice.
Prices may vary by country of residence. The applicable price is the one shown in the app at sign-up, in local currency or FCFA depending on the region.
Accepted payment methods: Mobile Money (MTN, Moov, Celtiis) and bank cards, via FedaPay.
Data you enter in GEXTIMO, inventories, customers, orders, stock, creations, belongs to you. NOVAFRIQ never becomes its owner and uses it only to operate the service.

You may export your data at any time: in CSV format (account and order data) and PDF (contractual documents), from your personal space or by request to dpo@novafriq.africa. If you cancel, we keep it for 90 days, then permanently delete it.

items: Provide accurate and up-to-date information
Use GEXTIMO normally and in accordance with these ToU
Not circumvent security
Not use the app for illegal activities
Immediately report any security issue
Not reproduce, copy or use other users' creations without authorisation

blocks.t: GEXTIMO, its code, algorithms and design, belongs to NOVAFRIQ. Any copying or exploitation without written consent is prohibited. For creator content (photos, collections, models), see Document 8. Creator Rights & Intellectual Property.
We provide the service diligently. Our total liability cannot exceed what you have paid during the 12 months preceding the issue.
We are not responsible for indirect damages, loss of business, or decisions you make based on information in the app.
You may cancel your account at any time from settings. We may suspend or close an account in the event of ToU violation, fraud, infringement of creators' rights, or repeated non-payment.

articles.title: ARTICLE 10: APPLICABLE LAW AND DISPUTE RESOLUTION

blocks.t: These ToU are governed by Beninese law, OHADA law and Law No. 2017-20. Digital Code. In the event of a dispute, we first seek an amicable resolution within 30 days. Otherwise, the Commercial Court of Cotonou has sole jurisdiction.
Contact: support@novafriq.africa | gextimo.novafriq.africa | Quartier Agblangandan, Sèmè-Podji, Benin

droits_createurs.title: Creator Rights & Intellectual Property
droits_createurs.subtitle: Application: GEXTIMO: African Fashion Marketplace | Publisher: NOVAFRIQ, SASU

blocks.t: This document defines the rights of creators (designers, stylists, artisans) who display their creations on GEXTIMO, and the rules protecting their intellectual property on the platform.
Each creator remains the sole owner of their creations published on GEXTIMO: photos, models, designs, collections, descriptions, videos. NOVAFRIQ acquires no ownership rights over this content.

By publishing on GEXTIMO, the creator grants NOVAFRIQ a limited, non-exclusive and revocable licence permitting solely the display, promotion and distribution of their creations within the normal operation of the platform.
This licence ends automatically upon the creator's account cancellation.

articles.title: ARTICLE 3: WHAT NOVAFRIQ CAN DO WITH CREATIONS

items: Display creations on the GEXTIMO storefront (gextimo.novafriq.africa)
Use images to promote GEXTIMO on social media and marketing materials, with mention of the creator
Index creations in search engines for their visibility

blocks.title: NOVAFRIQ CANNOT:
blocks.t: Sell creations to third parties, modify them without agreement, use them outside the GEXTIMO context, or transfer them to other platforms.

articles.title: ARTICLE 4: PROTECTION AGAINST COPYING AND PLAGIARISM

blocks.t: Copying, reproducing or unauthorised use of creations published on GEXTIMO is strictly prohibited, in accordance with intellectual property laws in force in Benin and international conventions.
Any user (customer, visitor or other creator) who copies, reproduces or appropriates a creation without the creator's explicit consent is exposed to civil and criminal proceedings.
If you identify a violation of your rights on GEXTIMO (photo copying, design plagiarism, unauthorised use), you may report it to:

blocks.title: Report contact
blocks.t: Email: contact@novafriq.africa | Subject: 'Report: creator rights violation'
NOVAFRIQ commits to handling each report within 72 business hours and removing any disputed content as quickly as possible after verification.
By publishing on GEXTIMO, the creator warrants that:

items: They are the author or rights holder of the published creations
The creations do not infringe third-party rights
The creations do not contain unlawful, offensive or content contrary to Beninese law

blocks.t: In the event of misrepresentation, the creator bears sole responsibility for the legal consequences.
The logo, brand and name 'GEXTIMO' are the exclusive property of NOVAFRIQ. Any use without prior written consent is prohibited.

conditions_vente.title: Terms of Sale & Commissions
conditions_vente.subtitle: Application: GEXTIMO: African Fashion Marketplace | Publisher: NOVAFRIQ, SASU
conditions_vente.note: Note: Provisions applicable from the activation of online payment on GEXTIMO (see ToU. Launch phase). At launch, the service operates in referral mode: these rules are not yet active.

blocks.t: GEXTIMO is a marketplace: creators (designers, stylists, artisans) display their collections and NOVAFRIQ manages the entire sales process on their behalf.
The sales flow works as follows:

items: The customer chooses a creation and places an order on GEXTIMO
Payment is made in full on the GEXTIMO platform (via FedaPay. Mobile Money or bank card)
Funds are collected by FedaPay (approved aggregator) on behalf of the creator. NOVAFRIQ never holds customer funds
NOVAFRIQ deducts its commission from the total amount
FedaPay remits the net balance to the creator, on NOVAFRIQ's instruction, within the agreed timeframes

blocks.t: No direct sale between creator and customer outside GEXTIMO is permitted for orders placed on the platform.
Commission rates are communicated to the creator at registration and may be revised with 30 days' notice.
The net balance is remitted to the creator, via FedaPay, within 7 business days of the customer's confirmation of receipt of the order.
In the absence of confirmation from the customer, remittance is released automatically after 14 days, in the absence of a dispute.
Remittance is made via FedaPay (Mobile Money or bank transfer).
Where a dispute is open on an order, the corresponding remittance is suspended until the dispute is resolved.

Each creator sets their creation prices freely. NOVAFRIQ displays the public price (including commission) on the storefront. The creator is informed of the net price they will receive before publication.
Prices are displayed in FCFA. NOVAFRIQ reserves the right to display equivalents in other currencies for guidance.
In the event of a refund request by a customer:

items: If the request is justified (non-conforming or undelivered item): full refund to the customer. The creator is notified and the amount is deducted from the next remittance.
If the request is unjustified: NOVAFRIQ decides after examining evidence provided by both parties.

blocks.t: Any dispute between creator and customer must be reported to: support@novafriq.africa

items: Describe creations honestly and precisely (materials, dimensions, production lead times)
Meet announced delivery timelines
Notify NOVAFRIQ immediately if an item becomes unavailable
Not offer off-platform items available on GEXTIMO
Respect the intellectual property rights of other creators
Display the creator's creations faithfully
Collect payments securely
Remit the net balance within the agreed timelines
Inform the creator of each order and each remittance
Protect the creator's creations from unauthorised copying (see Document 8)

blocks.t: By selling on GEXTIMO, the creator commits to these standards:

items: Respond to customer messages within 48 hours.
Accept or decline an order within 48 hours. Without a response, the order is cancelled and the customer automatically refunded.
Prepare and ship the order within the lead time announced on the product listing.
Update the customer at least once a week if production exceeds 15 days.
Describe creations accurately (materials, dimensions, lead times); photos must match the actual product.
Not sell off-platform an item available on GEXTIMO.

blocks.t: Progressive sanctions for non-compliance:

items: 1st level: reminder: message reminding of the rule not followed.
2nd level: warning: formal warning and suspension of promotional placement.
3rd level: suspension: 3 cancellations in 5 days = shop taken offline; 10 cancellations or refunds in 30 days = shop suspended and reviewed for closure.
Serious repeat offence: creator account closure, after notification and right of appeal.

blocks.t: The creator may appeal any sanction at support@novafriq.africa (right of appeal).
These terms are governed by Beninese law, OHADA law and Law No. 2017-20. Digital Code. In the event of a dispute, the Commercial Court of Cotonou has sole jurisdiction.

produits_interdits.title: Prohibited Products & Authorised Creations
produits_interdits.subtitle: Application: GEXTIMO: African Fashion Marketplace | Publisher: NOVAFRIQ, SASU
produits_interdits.version: Version 7.0: Established for GEXTIMO, fashion marketplace.

blocks.t: GEXTIMO is dedicated to fashion and craftsmanship. You may publish and sell:

items: Clothing, traditional garments and made-to-measure (couture, ready-to-wear).
Fashion accessories: bags, shoes, jewellery, hats, scarves.
Textiles, fabrics and materials.
Original creations designed or made by yourself.

blocks.t: Strictly prohibited on GEXTIMO:

items: Counterfeits and copies of brands, models or others' creations.
Illegal, stolen products or those infringing third-party rights.
Weapons, ammunition, explosives, dangerous or flammable products.
Drugs, tobacco, medicines and regulated substances.
Products from protected species (ivory, skins, etc.).
Hateful, violent, discriminatory or sexual content.
Any content endangering or sexualising a minor, zero tolerance.
Items unrelated to a tangible fashion creation.

blocks.t: Any prohibited product or content is removed. Depending on severity: reminder, warning, suspension, then account closure for repeat offences (see Seller Charter, Document 9).

blocks.title: Report
blocks.t: contact@novafriq.africa: Subject: 'Report: prohibited product'
We examine every report and act quickly.

livraison_retours.title: Delivery, Returns & Refunds
livraison_retours.subtitle: Delivery terms, return policy and refund conditions.

sections.p: Delivery times and costs are defined by each creator and indicated on their profile and in the quote. Gextimo is not directly responsible for delivery but supports the parties in the event of a dispute. Local (Cotonou and major cities) and international delivery options are available depending on the creator.

You can track the status of your order from your client area or via the public tracking page (by entering your order reference). Creators are required to update the order status at each important stage.

Made-to-measure creations are produced specifically for you according to your measurements and preferences. Due to their personalised nature, they are not eligible for return unless a proven non-conformity defect is established.

For ready-to-wear items, a return is possible within 14 days of receipt, provided the item is in its original condition (unworn, tags attached). Return costs are the customer's responsibility unless the item is defective.

In the event of an accepted return or cancellation before production begins, the refund will be processed to the original payment method within 7 to 14 business days. The Gextimo commission is non-refundable except in the event of our fault.

In the event of a dispute with a creator regarding delivery or the conformity of an order, contact our support via the claims form. Our team arbitrates disputes based on evidence provided by both parties.

regles_communaute.title: Community Rules
regles_communaute.subtitle: Application: GEXTIMO: African Fashion Marketplace | Publisher: NOVAFRIQ, SASU

blocks.t: GEXTIMO is a benevolent and professional fashion space. By using it, you agree to respect other members and these rules. They apply to all content: photos, descriptions, comments and messages.
Not permitted on GEXTIMO:

items: Hatred, discrimination, insults and harassment.
Violence, threats and incitement to violence.
Nudity and sexual content.
Any content endangering or sexualising a minor, zero tolerance.
Misinformation and identity theft.
Spam, unsolicited advertising and fake reviews.
Disclosing others' private information without consent.
Counterfeiting and copying other creators' creations.

blocks.t: Messaging is for exchanging about creations and orders. It is prohibited to harass a member, share prohibited content, or arrange an off-platform sale to bypass GEXTIMO.
We may remove content, restrict its distribution or suspend an account that breaches these rules. Sanctions are graduated: reminder, warning, suspension, closure.

blocks.title: Right of appeal
blocks.t: You may contest any sanction at: contact@novafriq.africa

blocks.title: Report
blocks.t: contact@novafriq.africa: We examine every report and act quickly.

contact_reclamations.title: Contact & Claims
contact_reclamations.subtitle: Application: GEXTIMO: African Fashion Marketplace | Publisher: NOVAFRIQ, SASU
meta_lines: Publisher: NOVAFRIQ, SASU: Quartier Agblangandan, Sèmè-Podji, Republic of Benin.

blocks.t: Depending on your need, write to the right address:

rows: Personal data and exercising your rights

blocks.t: Phone: +229 01 66 55 29 92 · Website: gextimo.novafriq.africa

blocks.title: Claim
blocks.t: support@novafriq.africa: Describe your request and, where possible, your order number.
We acknowledge receipt and respond as quickly as possible.

items: Data protection: you may contact the APDP (contact@apdp.bj · www.apdp.bj).
Commercial dispute: failing an amicable settlement, the Commercial Court of Cotonou has jurisdiction.
Buyer outside Benin: you may also use consumer mediation mechanisms in your country.

blocks.t: We acknowledge receipt of any complaint within 48 working hours and aim to provide a reasoned response within 15 days.
If the disagreement persists, you may turn to a consumer mediator. For any matter concerning your personal data, you may refer to Benin's Personal Data Protection Authority (APDP).

profil.anniversaire_hint: Optional — day and month are enough, for a little note on your day.

a_propos.description: Gextimo is the management application dedicated to tailoring workshops. It allows you to manage your clients, measurements, orders, and team from your phone.

features.commandes_desc: Track all your orders from measurements to delivery.
features.fidelite_desc: Accumulate points and offer bonuses to your best clients.
features.securite_desc: Your data is stored securely and backed up.
features.rapide_desc: Interface designed for craftsmen — simple, fast, efficient.

faq.q1: How do I add a new client?
faq.a1: Go to the Clients section, then tap the + button at the bottom right. Enter the client's name, surname, and phone number.
faq.q2: How do I record a client's measurements?
faq.a2: Open the client file, scroll to the Measurements section and tap "Edit measurements". You can enter all measurements and save them.
faq.q3: How do I create an order?
faq.a3: Tap the + button from the dashboard or the Orders page. Select the client, garment type, price, and expected delivery date.
faq.q4: How do I record a client payment?
faq.a4: From the order detail, scroll to the Payments section and tap "Add a payment". Enter the amount and payment method.
faq.q5: How do I add a team member?
faq.a5: Go to Settings → Team, then tap the + icon in the top right. A unique access code will be generated for the new member.
faq.q6: How does a team member sign in?
faq.a6: On the sign in page, tap the "Assistant / Staff" tab. Enter the access code provided by the owner. The initial password is the same as the access code.
faq.q7: How do I renew my subscription?
faq.a7: Go to Settings → Subscription. You will find available plans with a button to choose or renew your subscription via FedaPay.
faq.q8: Is my data backed up automatically?
faq.a8: Yes, all data is synchronized with our server in real time whenever you have an internet connection.
faq.q9: How do I send a WhatsApp reminder to a client?
faq.a9: From the client file, tap the WhatsApp icon. The app generates a pre-filled message that you simply send.
faq.q10: How do I redeem my loyalty points?
faq.a10: Go to the Loyalty Points section. If you have reached the conversion threshold, you will see a button "Convert to subscription days". Each conversion gives you 31 additional days.

contact.disponibilite: Our team is available to help you Monday to Friday, from 8am to 6pm.
contact.urgence: For urgent issues, prefer WhatsApp. For technical questions or refunds, use email.

veille.aucune_selection: The AI selected nothing this week (see raw results below).

pages.sous_titre: Edit the footer texts (legal notice, ToS, privacy, community rules…) like in Word, published on the site as soon as you save.
pages.choisir: Pick a page on the left to edit it.
pages.note: While the content is empty, the site shows the historical text. “Import current text” copies it here as a starting point.

reglages_vitrine.splash_aide: While a period is active, the launch screen uses this artwork instead of the brand. No active period: the standard Gextimo launch is used.
reglages_vitrine.legal_aide: These values feed the 11 legal pages. While a field is empty, the line quoting it DISAPPEARS from the page instead of showing a placeholder.
reglages_vitrine.chevauchement: This period overlaps another one: the first match will win.

moderation_avis.aide: These settings apply immediately, with no redeploy. The word list grows with real usage.
moderation_avis.max_jour: Maximum reviews per account per day
moderation_avis.max_jour_aide: Beyond this, submission is refused. Anti-spam guard.
moderation_avis.seuil_aide: Number of reports after which a review is sent to moderation.
moderation_avis.motifs_aide: A report using one of these grounds is queued immediately, without waiting for the threshold.
moderation_avis.mots_aide: A review containing one of these words is held for moderation. One word per line. Matching respects word boundaries.

analytique.sous_titre: Your data, collected by Gextimo — without Google or Meta.
analytique.recherches_vides_aide: What your visitors look for and do not find — the most useful list to decide what to add.
analytique.vide_aide: Collection started on 16 July. This screen fills up as visitors arrive.

compte_rebours.aide: A discreet banner appears as the date approaches, then a full-screen countdown on the day. Everything hides itself once the date has passed.

infos.portee_zero: This targeting reaches no workshop — check the values.
infos.aide: News is an editorial message to professionals (announcement, new feature, tip). Distinct from notifications, which report an event on the workshop and call for action.

journal_maj.aide: What professionals read under the "What’s new" screen. Releases are automatic, so this is where changes get described — otherwise the app evolves and nobody knows what changed.
journal_maj.lignes_aide: One bullet per line. Write for a user, not a developer.

fidelite.aide: Point thresholds for each tier. Adjust against what workshops actually generate: an unreachable threshold makes the programme invisible and nobody converts.

coordonnees.aide: Used in PDF documents and WhatsApp shares. A phone number change happens here, with no technical work.

moyens_paiement.aide: What professionals can offer on quotes and invoices. Does NOT affect the till or orders, which record how the customer actually paid on site (cash included).

vasat.aide: Hidden product, password protected. The password is never shown again: leave the field empty to keep the current one.
vasat.non_defini: No password set: access is closed.

banniere.sponsorisation_desc: The creator pays to appear at the top of the storefront. Price in FCFA, editable without touching the code.

bienvenue.etape2_desc: Publish your work to attract clients.
bienvenue.etape3_desc: Clients will contact you directly through your showcase.

vide.croquis_sous: Draw your ideas and photograph them: your digital sketchbook starts here.

vide.patron_sous: Archive your patterns with sizes, level and piece count — then sell them from your catalog.
vide.moodboard_sous: Collage your inspirations and note your color palette.

videos.lien_non_reconnu: This link is not recognised as a video. It will stay a plain link, without embedded playback.
videos.formats: MP4, MOV or WebM · 100 MB maximum

realisations.intro: Publish photos of your finished pieces. After our team reviews them, they appear on your public profile with a Gextimo watermark.
realisations.vide_desc: Create your first piece to showcase it on your public profile.
realisations.certif_auteur: I certify that I am the author of these photos and of the piece shown.
realisations.consentement: I confirm I have the consent of any people visible in the photos.
realisations.certif_hint: Tick both boxes to submit for review.
realisations.photo_requise: Add at least one photo before submitting.

admin.confirmer_approbation: Publish this piece? The watermark will be applied automatically.

realisations.quota_alerte: Only {{n}} post(s) left in this cycle. A higher plan includes more.
realisations.quota_bloque: Post quota reached for this cycle. It resets on {{reset}}, or upgrade your plan.

retouche.aide: Straighten, crop and brighten before publishing. The original is always kept: a retouch never replaces it.
retouche.echec: The retouch could not be saved. Nothing was changed.

realisations.hors_ligne: You are offline: this list comes from your device. Approvals and rejections received since are not shown yet.

qualite.resolution: Photo too small — move closer or use a higher resolution
qualite.cadrage: Framing too elongated — crop closer to a square
qualite.luminosite: Photo too dark or too bright — retake it with better lighting
qualite.nettete: Photo blurry — steady the device and refocus

annonces.sous_titre: Let your clients know what is happening in your workshop.
annonces.quota_bloque: You have already published an announcement today.
annonces.quota_demain: You can publish a new one on {{date}}.
annonces.quota_boost: To give your running announcement more visibility, use Boost.
annonces.vide_desc: Your first announcement will appear here.
annonces.boost_aide: For the whole Boost period, your announcement is shown {{n}} times a day at the top of the announcement band.
annonces.boost_indispo: Boost is not available at the moment.

infos.vide_desc: Announcements, new features and tips from the Gextimo team will appear here.

quoi_de_neuf.vide_desc: New features and fixes will appear here.

aide.role_intro: These rights are YOUR workshop's. If you tightened them, that is what you see here.
